---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a reproducible bug in Aiscern
title: '[BUG] '
labels: 'bug, needs-triage'
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, screenshots, or console output.

## Environment

- **Browser**: (e.g. Chrome 123, Safari 17, Firefox 124)
- **OS**: (e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11, Ubuntu 22)
- **Device**: (e.g. iPhone 14, Desktop)
- **Plan**: (Free / Pro / Enterprise)
- **Page/Feature**: (e.g. Image Detection, Web Scanner)

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information (network logs, HAR files, etc.).

---

> ⚠️ **Security vulnerabilities**: Do NOT file here. See [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md).
